titleStmt.title: SII 5.409: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 409. (A.R. No. 120 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 6 10 8 Itiṉmeṟ cellāniṉṟa kollam 7 100 2 10 2 varuṣam kāttikaimātam 10 3 Apara
pakṣa ttu pañcamiyum cukkiravāramum peṟṟa pūcattiṉāḷ cetuṅkanāṭṭuc caṅkaranārāyaṇamūrtti tiruveḷaikkāṟaṉ
veṉṟumaṇkoṇṭa śrībhūtalavirarāmavanma[ rā ṉa] cetuṅkanāṭṭu muttavar kiḻvempanāṭṭut tirunelveliyil
Uṭaiyār nelveliuṭaiya tampirāṉā koyil patipātamulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācārya de vakaṉmikaḷukku meṟpaṭi
ūr Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟkum nācciyār tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu Āḷuṭaiyanācciyā
ṟkum rāmavanmansandhi pūcai naṭakkumpaṭi kaṟpitta pūcaikku tevatāṉamāka koṭutta kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟam śrīval labhan
maṅgalam melpiṭākai nattam meṟkoṭi mutalkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal cāttaṉūr nakarattu vaṭakku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇā
ṟuvaraiyil muṉṉāḷil tevaṟku tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam tāṉam maṭappiṟam niṟuvākam Uḷpaṭṭa va
kaiyil melvāram nikki Uvāti viṉiyokaṅ kaṇakkilakkai Uḷpaṭṭa vakaiyum nikki niṉṟa nilattukku
nālutara ttilum kārpacāṉa melvāra m Uvāti viṉiyokam kaṇakkuilakkai Amutupaṭi maṟṟum E
ppeṟpaṭṭa nām koḷḷum komuṟaippāṭu Uḷpaṭa Eppeṟpaṭṭa samastaprāpti- kaḷum meṟpaṭi Ūrum
koyilum Ūriluḷppaṭṭa paṭṭaṭai mutal māvaṭai maravaṭai cekkiṟai taṟikkaṭamai Uḷpaṭa
vakaiyum Āka Inta Ūrukkum nilattukkum perunāṉkellaiyāvatu cāttaṉūr Eṭṭāṅ kaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 5.409 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
